## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it is needed.

## Codex compatibility

- Codex desktop version tested:
- Windows version and display scaling:
- Native selector or renderer structure affected:

## Validation

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Silent selection verified without opening native menus
- [ ] Palette placement checked against the native selector
- [ ] No credentials, task identifiers, or conversation content included

## Screenshots or logs

Attach only sanitized evidence. Remove personal paths, task identifiers, authentication data, and conversation content.
